pages.title: You Are Not Alone
pages.text: The wilds hold more than monsters. Other $(rune)ranked hunters$() roam the realm - rivals, not beasts - taking contracts, clearing Gates, and fighting the same threats you do. Some are beneath you. A few will end you.

pages.title: They Grow As You Do
pages.text: A rival hunter earns renown from its $(em)own$() kills, and when it has earned enough it $(rune)ascends a rank$() - gaining health and pulling a better $(gold)loadout$() on right there in the field.$(br2)$(soft)The D-Rank you ignore today may be a C-Rank threat tomorrow.$()

pages.title: Arcanists Cast
pages.text: B-Rank and above carry true Iron's Spells gear, and the $(rune)casters$() among them throw $(em)real spells$() - Magic Missiles, fireballs, ice - not just swings. Closing on a robed hunter is a $(warn)decision$(), not a reflex.

$(gold)Named rivals$() are known across the realm: $(em)Mira Ash$() (C scout), $(em)Seren Valehart$() (B arcanist), $(em)Kael Vorn$() (A monster hunter), and the $(warn)Black Hound$() (S, unknown). Cross one and it becomes a story.

pages.title: Reading a Rival
pages.text: Judge a rival's tier by the $(l:ascendant_codex:hunters_path/guild_ranks_e_to_s)Guild Ranks$(), and learn what their casters are doing to you in $(l:ascendant_codex:magic/casting_spells)Casting Spells$().$(br2)$(soft)Treat them as you would another player - because that is the point.$()
